title: Hapbeat Firmware Distribution Manifest
description: Unified firmware manifest aggregating variants across multiple firmware repos. Schema v3 adds per-env independent versioning metadata (contentHash / path / buildSha / publishedAt) — see specs/firmware-distribution.md (DEC-035). Readers MUST accept schema_version 2 and 3.

generated_at.description: Unix epoch ms when this manifest was aggregated.

contentHash.description: sha256 of the published bytes (app-only for appOta; full image for serial-only envs). Identity / UI signal only — NOT an OTA gate (the device cannot report its own image hash).

path.description: Absolute URL (same-origin asset proxy or CDN). When present, consumers fetch this verbatim instead of building <BASE>/<filename>. Required for private-repo distribution where filename alone is not reachable.

fwVersion.description: Bare semver of this release (dev builds carry a dN suffix). No leading 'v'.

tag.description: GitHub Release tag this version came from. Namespaced per env: <repoShort>/<env>/vX.Y.Z (e.g. dev/necklace_v3/v0.1.4).

publishedAt.description: Release-tag publish time (epoch ms). Distinct from artifact.mtime (CI write time ≈ deploy time). Absent for dev / hand-rolled manifests.

buildSha.description: Source commit the binary was built from (audit only).

id.description: Unique id within the manifest, e.g. <repo-short>/<env>.

hapbeat.description: true = wearable Hapbeat (duo_wl_* / band_wl_*); false = ecosystem peripheral (broker / sensor / transmitter).

fwVersion.description: Latest version's bare semver (mirror of versions[0].fwVersion).

publishedAt.description: Latest version's release-tag publish time (epoch ms). Mirror of versions[0].publishedAt.

versions.description: All published versions newest-first (archive / rollback). versions[0] mirrors the top-level fields.
